who: Sales Operations Managers at SaaS companies processing 10-20 commission reports/month
offer: For Sales Operations Managers at SaaS companies processing 10-20 commission reports/month, manual data entry causes payroll delays. We automate commission data conversion instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual conversion of commission data into payroll formats is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Sales Operations Managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to Sales Operations Managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface for data input on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
